en: I'm used to thinking of the TED audience as a wonderful collection of some of the most
ko: I'm used to thinking of the TED audience as a wonderful collection of some of the most

en: effective, intelligent, intellectual, savvy, worldly, and innovative people in the world,
ko: effective, intelligent, intellectual, savvy, worldly, and innovative people in the world,

en: However, I also have reason to believe that many, if not most of you, are actually tying
ko: However, I also have reason to believe that many, if not most of you, are actually tying

en: your shoes incorrectly. Now, I know that seems ludicrous.
ko: your shoes incorrectly. Now, I know that seems ludicrous.

en: I know that seems ludicrous, and believe me, I lived the same sad life until about three years ago.
ko: I know that seems ludicrous, and believe me, I lived the same sad life until about three years ago.

en: And what happened to me was I bought what was for me a very expensive pair of shoes,
ko: And what happened to me was I bought what was for me a very expensive pair of shoes,

en: but those shoes came with round nylon laces, and I couldn't keep them tied.
ko: but those shoes came with round nylon laces, and I couldn't keep them tied.

en: So I went back to the store and said to the owner, I love the shoes, but I hate the laces.
ko: So I went back to the store and said to the owner, I love the shoes, but I hate the laces.

en: He took a look and said, oh, you're tying them wrong.
ko: He took a look and said, oh, you're tying them wrong.
